name: Infinity Flex
shortDescription: Used to prevent hyperextension of the PIP joint.

inputParameters.InputDescription: 1. P1 circumference (mm) at the midpoint of the proximal phalanx.
3. P2 circumference (mm) at the midpoint of the middle phalanx.
4. Interphalangeal length (mm) - Midpoint of the proximal phalanx to midpoint of the middle phalanx.
5. Angle (degrees) of desired flexion from a straight position.
